title: Failure to give notice; validity of judgment not affected
doc_html:
§3495. Failure to give notice; validity of judgment not affected

            A failure to give the notice required pursuant to R.S. 13:3494 shall not invalidate a judgment of child support.

            Acts 2016, No. 216, §1.
doc_text:
§3495.  Failure to give notice; validity of judgment not affected
A failure to give the notice required pursuant to R.S. 13:3494 shall not invalidate a
judgment of child support.
Acts 2016, No. 216, §1.
